prerequisites: A Retently account with API access. The REST API is served from the base URL https://app.retently.com/api/v2.

An API key generated in your Retently account settings. Keys can be issued with Read permission (GET only) or Write permission (GET, POST, DELETE), so create a key whose permission level matches what the sync needs (read-only is sufficient for extracting data).

Values for the credentials object configured on the connector. At minimum supply the API key; the client_secret and refresh_token fields are only needed if you authenticate with a refresh-token credential set instead of a static API key.

authMethods.name: API key (credentials.api_key)
authMethods.summary: Primary and recommended method. Provide the API key from your Retently account settings in credentials.api_key. Retently sends it in the X-Api-Key request header (the recommended form); a legacy Authorization: api_key=YOUR_KEY header is also accepted. Keys carry Read or Write permissions, so use a read-capable key for extraction.

authMethods.name: Refresh-token credentials (credentials.client_secret + credentials.refresh_token)
authMethods.summary: Alternative credential set exposed by the connector via credentials.client_secret and credentials.refresh_token, used when authenticating with a refresh token rather than a static API key. Populate these instead of api_key only if you have been issued a client secret and refresh token; otherwise leave them blank and use the API key.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key in Retently
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Retently and open your account settings, where API keys are managed. Create a key with the permission level you need: Read (GET only) is enough to extract data, while Write adds POST and DELETE. Copy the key value, as it authenticates every API request.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Fill in the connector's credentials object. For the standard setup, set credentials.api_key to the key you generated. If instead you were issued a refresh-token credential set, set credentials.client_secret and credentials.refresh_token and leave the API key unset.

setupSteps.title: Verify the connection
setupSteps.body: The connector calls the Retently REST API at https://app.retently.com/api/v2, sending the API key in the X-Api-Key header. Run the connector's check/test step to confirm the credentials are accepted before scheduling a sync.

sources.title: Retently API Documentation - REST API Reference
